name: The River Club of New York
about: The River Club of New York is a premier family club located in Manhattan, offering a wide range of athletic and social amenities. Its facilities include 2 golf simulators, 2 tennis courts, 3 squash courts, a platform tennis court, a pool, and a fitness center. The club also provides multiple dining venues, private event spaces, and overnight guest rooms, all with views of the East River. It operates on a membership model, catering to families and individuals looking for a comprehensive club experience in the heart of New York City.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art golf simulators for year-round practice and play
Exclusive membership providing access to premium athletic facilities
Scenic East River views enhancing the overall experience
Part of a multi-sport club offering a comprehensive wellness lifestyle

food_and_drink.notes: Multiple dining venues available, with overnight stays including complimentary European-style continental breakfast in The Bar.
Full bar service is available as part of the dining and event offerings.

simulator_hardware.notes: The website mentions 2 golf simulators but does not specify the brand or model.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While it is not explicitly stated on the website, it is standard practice at golf simulator venues to allow players to bring their own clubs. The facility may also offer rental clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The club has multiple dining venues, so outside food and drinks are likely not permitted. All overnight stays include complimentary breakfast in The Bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes. This information would typically depend on the simulator software and player speed.

faq.question: Is The River Club kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The River Club is explicitly described as a 'premier Family Club' and offers amenities like a pool and junior programs, making it a suitable environment for families.
